basic_details.job_title: DIAT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online For Project Assistant / Lab Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Defence Institute of Advanced Technology (DIAT) Project Assistant / Lab Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of DIAT. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DIAT Project Assistant / Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Upper age-limit is relaxable up to 05 years for SC/ST, Women & PWD and 03 years for OBC (NC)/EBW candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/ M.Tech/ M. Tech 2nd year studying in Electronics/ E&TC/ EEE/ Instrumentation Engg., M.Sc/ B.Sc
qualification.details: B.Tech/ M.Tech/ M. Tech 2nd year studying in Electronics/ E&TC/ EEE/ Instrumentation Engg. OR M.Sc/ B.Sc / Integrated degree or equivalent in Electronics / Physics/ Applied Physics/ Electronics Science.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DIAT Project Assistant / Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DIAT Project Assistant / Lab Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 12-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant / Lab Assistant post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000 per month for the Project Assistant / Lab Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.Tech/ M.Tech/ M. Tech (2nd year studying) in Electronics/ E&TC/ EEE/ Instrumentation Engg., or M.Sc/ B.Sc / Integrated degree in Electronics / Physics/ Applied Physics/ Electronics Science.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the DIAT Project Assistant / Lab Assistant position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data and attach necessary documents, then send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant / Lab Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an interview, which can be conducted either in-person or through video conferencing.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant / Lab Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant / Lab Assistant position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Assistant / Lab Assistant is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Defence Institute of Advanced Technology (DIAT) located?
faq.answer: The Defence Institute of Advanced Technology (DIAT) is located in Pune, Maharashtra, with the pincode 411025.
